output.summary: Strong week: 8.5% reply rate beats benchmark. Subject variant A outperforming B by 83%. Two meetings booked at $0.62 each.
wins: Variant A subject line ('quick question about...') winning
losses: 3 unsubscribes — check if step 0 is too direct

recommendations.description: Retire variant B, make variant A the default subject template
Deprioritize UK until messaging is localized
Test case-study opener vs hiring-signal opener

proposedExperiments.name: opener-type-test
proposedExperiments.hypothesis: Case study openers convert better than hiring signals for established agencies
